prestazioni: M840T 4.0L twin-turbocharged V8 hybrid powertrain recalibration via McLaren Special Operations (MSO) bespoke ECU remap with 850+ hp target, utilizing a Motec M182 standalone ECU for precise fuel and ignition mapping, paired with a custom titanium exhaust system by Akrapović featuring 4-2-1 headers and electronically controlled bypass valves for optimized backpressure and sound modulation

Hybrid battery system upgrade with a bespoke lithium-ion pack from Rimac Technology, increasing energy density by 22% and enabling a 0-60 mph time of under 2.5 seconds via enhanced torque fill and regenerative braking optimization, integrated with a P1-derived KERS cooling system using a secondary radiator by PWR Performance Products

Suspension overhaul with a full Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilover system, featuring 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression) and McLaren-specific spring rates (front: 220 N/mm, rear: 280 N/mm), paired with a carbon-fiber anti-roll bar kit by Dymag and spherical bearing suspension mounts from SuperPro for chassis rigidity
estetica: Full Hermes-inspired carbon-fiber body kit by MSO, including a bespoke front splitter with active aerodynamic elements, side skirts with integrated LED lighting channels, and a rear diffuser with a 3D-printed titanium mesh overlay for heat dissipation and visual contrast against the Speedtail’s signature teardrop silhouette

Custom 22-inch forged magnesium wheels by HRE Performance Wheels (FF16 model), featuring a split-spoke design with a brushed titanium finish and center-locking system, wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (245/35 R22 front, 325/30 R22 rear) with custom Hermes-orange sidewall lettering

Interior reimagined with a full Hermes leather overhaul, including hand-stitched saddle-brown leather on the dashboard, door cards, and center console, contrasted with carbon-fiber trim inserts and a bespoke steering wheel by MSO featuring a titanium shift paddle and a digital display for hybrid system monitoring, all paired with a custom Alcantara headliner in Hermes-orange
